item.description: The inspirational Aussie plans to use her experience as a new mum.

item.description: ‘The issue has never been accommodation’.

item.description: The club’s bosses have met with AFL powerbrokers and they are now ‘bordering on confident’.

item.description: Even at 41 years old the superstar is set to spark a bidding war to tilt the power balance again.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: The simple tech mistakes keeping families apart and how to fix it
item.description: ‘The more people you talk to, especially within your own family unit about what’s going on, the more help you can get.’

item.title: Socceroos coach Tony Popovic blasted for replacing Patrick Beach with Maty Ryan for penalty shootout
item.description: The Socceros coach has copped an absolute pasting for a ‘stupid decision’ that had fans seeing red.

item.title: Jury duty explained: What really happens behind closed doors as 12 ordinary Australians decide someone’s fate
item.description: Jurors face confronting evidence, strict social media rules and the weight of deciding another person’s future.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce marry at Madison Square Garden
item.description: The long anticipated union of sports and song has brought hype to new heights in New York.

item.title: Chemical risk prompts major response after mystery space objects wash up at Forrest Beach in Queensland
item.description: Authorities are keeping locals away from the beach until the mysterious cannisters can be removed.

item.title: Socceroos fuming over Egypt tackle that took Jordy Bos out of the game
item.description: The incident has been called ‘reckless’ and ‘nasty’, and now Australia is praying for good news.

item.title: 2026 Leapmotor B05 price and specs
item.description: The Leapmotor B05 is the Chinese brand's first non-SUV model in Australia, and will also be its cheapest vehicle yet.

item.title: Motorcyclist killed after careening into building in Western Sydney
item.description: The rider is believed to be aged in his early 20s.

item.title: Fed Square erupts as Aussie fans go viral for invading Wallmart in Dallas
item.description: ‘This is brilliant.’

item.title: Extreme heat disrupts Fourth of July celebrations across US
item.description: US authorities were forced to cancel numerous 250th anniversary celebrations around the country as a ‘heat-dome’ endangers people’s health.

item.title: South Sydney veteran Cody Walker cops one-game ban for kicking Jack Cogger
item.description: ‘I let my teammates down and I’m really sorry about that.’

item.title: ‘Don’t panic’: Aussies urged to remain vigilant as bird flu outbreak grows
item.description: Scientists are urging Australians to remain vigilant as surveillance and testing intensify after bird flu was detected in a third state.

item.title: Socceroos goalkeepers didn’t see shootout switch-up coming
item.description: It is the move that has baffled fans and experts and now the people involved have explained precisely what happened.

item.title: Man accused of laundering $2.4 million through construction business
item.description: The 45-year-old allegedly cleaned money for an organised crime group.

item.title: Support swells for Socceroos teen Lucas Herrington after World Cup penalty miss
item.description: The former Swedish superstar had just one word to describe a penalty kick, and told the 18-year-old to ‘reach out’.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Owner finds beloved dog after it was trapped in rubble for days
item.description: ‘With all the tragedy of the earthquake, it’s one positive thing in all the bad.’

item.title: Adelaide forward Riley Thilthorpe ‘out cold’ after mystery illness in Perth
item.description: ‘Hopefully this is something sharp and quick that rips through him.’

item.title: Is your child devastated the Socceroos lost? Here’s how to help
item.description: Australia’s heart-wrenching loss in the World Cup could be an opportunity to help children strengthen their emotional regulation skills.

item.title: Novak Djokovic survives awkward day in Wimbledon sun as Jannik Sinner moves into last-16
item.description: ‘Let’s just stop it here and call Roger to come.’

item.title: Week-long funeral ceremony begins in Iran for slain leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Crowds and clerics weeped as the zealot’s body lay in state.

item.title: Brisbane assistant Cam Bruce declines request be part of Carlton coach process
item.description: The names are really adding up but the respected 46-year-old won’t be there after he was ‘sounded out’.

item.title: Neil the seal wreaks havoc as experts warn of ‘loving him to death’
item.description: The state’s favourite elephant seal could be in danger of being euthanised.

item.title: AFL world in state of shock as Melbourne Demons destroy Hawthorn in Tasmania
item.description: ‘I can’t remember a game like it.’

item.title: Four people saved by police after car was swept away in flooding in Glenmaggie, Victoria
item.description: The group sat on the roof of the car while waiting for officers to rescue them.

item.title: Ex chess champion Vladimir Kramnik suspended over his cheating claims
item.description: ‘I am absolutely confident that this unlawful verdict will ultimately be overturned.’

item.title: Enigmatic forward Jake Stringer explains pointed celebration to Pat Voss in Giants’ upset win over Fremantle
item.description: The enigmatic forward kicked a career-high bag of seven goals to end the Dockers’ winning streak.

item.title: The Issue podcast: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese shores up Pacific ties as Beijing eyes region
item.description: Experts have applauded the strategy to seek agreements with Pacific neighbours amid China’s looming influence.

item.title: Brayden Maynard makes contact with umpire as tensions explode during wild brawl between Collingwood and Gold Coast
item.description: The veteran made contact with the official as players from both sides rushed in remonstrate.

item.title: Axe, blood and zip ties found inside Adelaide home after man allegedly tortured, held hostage
item.description: Authorities were alerted when the man frantically banged on a neighbour’s door for help.

item.title: Queensland child safety minister Amanda Camm defends emergency protocol as more kids reveal harrowing stories of state care
item.description: ‘You don’t get any care whatsoever.’
